title: Eat Quiet!
description: Eating and drinking is too loud? This makes it quieter!
body:
# Eat Quiet!

**Eat Quiet!** is a tiny Minecraft resource pack that makes eating and drinking sounds much quieter — without removing them completely.

Perfect for **content creators**, **PvP enjoyers**, and anyone who finds the default eating sounds distracting or annoying.

---

## 🔉 What this pack does
- Significantly reduces **eating**, **drinking**, and **burp** sounds
- Keeps audio feedback (nothing is fully muted)
- Affects **only** food & drink sounds
- No visual changes

---

## 🎥 Why use Eat Quiet!
- Better audio for recordings and streams  
- Less distraction during PvP or building  
- Cleaner overall sound experience  
- Vanilla-friendly

---

## ❓ FAQ

### Is this client-side?
Yes. You can use it on any server.

### Does it work with other resource packs?
Yes. Place **Eat Quiet!** above other packs if they also modify sounds.

### Does this affect other player sounds?
No. Only food- and drink-related sounds are changed.

---

## 📌 Compatibility
- Minecraft **1.20+**
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Compatible with mods and resource packs
